positive: Minimalist, abstract celestial map showing a winding nebula river flowing through constellations of stylized mythical beasts and celestial bodies. The main subject is a stylized, phosphorescent aurora borealis shaped like a flowing letter 'S'. Use a deep cosmic indigo and royal purple palette, contrasting sharply with ethereal gold and bioluminescent cyan highlights. The composition should feature a strong central axis, emphasizing clean, graphic silhouettes of stars and constellations. Style: Contemporary scientific illustration meets Art Deco poster design. Lighting: Deep space gradient with intense glow only on the neon elements. Ideal for wearable art, clean edges, seamless tiling potential. Print-friendly, vector-graphic quality.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, signatures, artifacts, noise, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low contrast, grainy, photo-realistic, messy, chaotic, distracting elements, grain, sepia, monochrome
